reasoning_model_1: Model 1 perfectly generates the requested text '关键在于沟通，我们必须保持开放。' without any errors or additions. Regarding the specific instruction to emphasize '关键' (Key), the model executes this well. reasoning_model_2: Model 2 speaks the target sentence '关键在于沟通，我们必须保持开放' (00:00-00:03), but explicitly fails the content accuracy criterion by hallucinating and adding a significant amount of unrequested text (00:04-00:24), continuing for over 20 seconds. model_comparison: Model 1 is the clear winner. It followed the content instructions perfectly, synthesizing only the requested text, and successfully applied the requested stress (重音) on the word '关键'. Model 2, while having a natural voice quality, failed significantly on content accuracy by generating a long, unrequested monologue after the target sentence. This excessive addition violates the user's specific command format. Therefore, Model 1 demonstrates superior control and adherence to instructions.
